name: CVF Governance Evidence Receipt Review Freeze
owner: CVF evidence, worker-return, and closure governance surface
purpose: Preserve the rule that no package-like capability use becomes trusted closure without receipts, review gate evidence, and an explicit freeze or non-freeze decision.
useWhen: A worker or reviewer must prove that a capability-like action has receipts, verification levels, review evidence, and a closure/freeze boundary.
doNotUseWhen: No capability-like action is claimed, or evidence is already fully governed by a more specific closure packet.
executionConstraints: metadata-only candidate; does not implement receipt schema validation or freeze automation
acceptanceEvidence: future promotion requires package instance evidence and reviewer proof of receipt completeness
authorityCeiling: metadata-only evidence guidance; cannot certify or freeze work without reviewer closure
permissions: read metadata and cited governed source artifacts only
rollback: delete this registry entry and regenerate the skill index if reviewer rejects AGSK-T7
safeStop: if receipts are missing for a trusted closure claim, stop and mark closure untrusted or blocked
capabilityBoundary: no certification decision, no automatic freeze, no checker wiring, no runtime activation
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver returns identity and selector fields; does not open any SKILL.md or instruction body
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to certify, freeze, or close a capability claim
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not authored in AGSK-T7
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in AGSK-T7
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation permitted until a separate ASSF adapter work order is accepted
shellAssumptions: no shell execution required for metadata-only candidate
